claims.claim: C1: frequency-separated HRL can share one training core
claims.evidence: Shared dual PPO loop drives Trading and Transit surrogate adapters.
claims.remaining_gap: Copied Transit native simulator still uses copied RESAC runner.

claims.claim: C2: high-level plan variables can be learned as curves
claims.evidence: Upper PPO action can parameterize Bernstein coefficients.
claims.remaining_gap: Public-data and copied-Transit learned plan-coefficient training remain open.

claims.claim: C3: promotion should trigger replanning after persistent shocks
claims.evidence: Promotion-forced plan replan beats interval-only replan on recovery scenario.
claims.remaining_gap: Not yet embedded in learned PPO/off-policy runner.

claims.claim: C4: leakage can be constrained at loss level
claims.evidence: PPO trajectory constraints with primal-dual multiplier reduce lower-LF drift.
claims.remaining_gap: Constraint trades off return/Sharpe and did not improve Transit surrogate drift.

claims.claim: C5: advanced causal encoders can be swapped by domain
claims.evidence: Adaptive lifting wavelet runs in Trading and Transit trackers and ablation.
claims.remaining_gap: Neural state-space and PINN-constrained encoders remain open.

claims.claim: C6: public-data validation covers more than daily bars
claims.remaining_gap: Short Level-1 intraday slice only; no order book or execution simulator.
